market_overview.headline: Market structure remains fragmented with geopolitical tensions weighing on broader participation despite individual sector strength.
market_overview.detail: Both SPY and QQQ are in Bear Rally mode with bullish crossover potential, while 42% of stocks remain in Full Bull trends. Energy minerals lead with 100% bullish participation amid Iran tensions.

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Technology Leading Momentum Surge
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology names dominate momentum leaders with semiconductor and optical equipment showing explosive gains. Producer manufacturing also accelerating with strong EMA spreads.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Leads While Tech Services Under Pressure

strongest.note: Perfect bullish participation as Iran tensions boost energy complex
Industrial strength with 94% bullish participation and strong momentum
Semiconductor and tech hardware showing acceleration despite broader tech weakness

weakest.note: Software and cloud names under severe distribution pressure
Biotech and medical device names struggling despite defensive appeal
Banking sector mixed with some names showing reversal potential

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation into energy and industrial names while growth tech faces continued selling pressure. Electronic technology providing leadership within broader tech weakness.

items.text: Failed US-Iran peace talks escalating geopolitical tensions and energy price volatility
Technology services sector in severe bear structure with 84% of names bearish
SPY and QQQ both in bear rally mode despite bullish crossover potential - false breakout risk
BTC showing -45% deviation from fair value suggests crypto correlation risk persists

news_drivers.headline: What Moved Markets
news_drivers.summary: Failed US-Iran peace talks dominated headlines, driving safe-haven flows into the dollar and energy sector strength. Geopolitical tensions around the Strait of Hormuz created energy supply concerns while broader equity markets remained subdued on uncertainty.

items.text: US-Iran negotiations collapse sparks fresh safe-haven demand and energy sector outperformance
Trump vows Strait of Hormuz blockade escalating Middle East tensions and oil price volatility
Dollar strength on geopolitical uncertainty weighing on risk asset sentiment
Energy refining infrastructure concerns as Iran aims to restore capacity within two months
Defense sector positioned to benefit from escalating regional conflict dynamics
